corrections.current: καὶ ὁ ζυγὸς τοῦ κλοιοῦ αὐτοῦ κατευ-
corrections.correct: καὶ ὁ ζυγὸς τοῦ κλοιου αὐτοῦ κατευ-
corrections.note: Printed form has κλοιου without accent in this line; transcript adds circumflex.
Extraneous '| AQ' is not present here; AQ belongs with the next variant line.

corrections.current: εσχατου A | οργης] εσρης A*vid (οργ. Aa) | οη η ορασις Q
corrections.correct: εσχατου A | οργης] εσρης A*vid (οργ. Aa) | οη ορασις Q
corrections.note: Apparatus reads οη ορασις Q, not οη η ορασις Q.
The siglum is Ba, not the Greek alpha attached to Q.
Printed sigla are BQ; transcript has garbled characters.

uncertain.note: Accentuation of κλοιου/κλοιοῦ is visually clear enough to note, but this may reflect Swete's printed accenting rather than a substantive transcription issue.

notes: Page number 555 matches image though user referred to scan page 578. Body line numbers 19–27 and IX 1–4 are correctly represented as verse numbers, not marginal line numbers.
